description: Analyze 12 months of warehouse inventory transactions for 150 SKUs at Pacific Coast Distribution to perform ABC revenue classification (A: top 80%, B: next 15%, C: bottom 5%), calculate inventory turnover ratios, and identify dead stock (zero shipments in the most recent 90 days). Using data from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/inventory_transactions.csv, ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/product_catalog.csv, and ~/Documents/warehouse_parameters.txt, compute reorder points and safety stock levels. Organize the analysis into a multi-sheet inventory optimization workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/inventory_optimization.xlsx featuring a summary dashboard with key metrics including total revenue, class distribution, and dead stock value.
